entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
"Check my answer before giving yours."
"Explain democracy with characters"
"Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Eman bertsio zailago bat nik saiatu ondoren."

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
"Make a story about ecosystems"
"Teach fractions as a story"
"Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Erabili nire azterketako, proiektuko edo eguneroko bizitzako adibideak."

entries.source: AI prompts
Ask for a tiny first task.
Creativity
End with a recap you write yourself.
For Story Tutor, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Story Tutor-rako praktika-ziklo erabilgarria hau da:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Modu honetarako, lana sinplea da: bihurtu kontzeptuak istorio, pertsonaia, gatazka eta eszena gogoangarrietan.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Prompt onek normalean hiru gauza dituzte: gaia, zure egungo maila eta nahi duzun laguntza mota. Ez duzu formulazio perfekturik behar. Saioa hasteko adina testuinguru besterik ez duzu behar.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Erantzuna zabalegia iruditzen bazaizu, estutu. Eskatu adibide bat, uste oker bat, egiaztapen-galdera bat edo hurrengo urrats bat. Errazegia bada, eskatu erronka bat. Zaila bada, eskatu dagoeneko dakizunetik zubi bat.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Story Tutor on inspir.
entries.value: inspir-en Story Tutor erabiliz ikaskuntza-emaitza erabilgarriak lortzeko prompt ideiak eta ikasketa-ziklo errepikagarria.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: AI erantzun bat irakurtzea ez da ikastea bera. Lehen erantzunaren ondoren, eskatu moduari ideiarekin zerbait eginarazteko.

entries.source: Related learning paths
Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Eskatu feedbacka ziurra sentitu ez den zatiari buruz.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
Start with one clear request
State the goal in one sentence.
Story Tutor prompts and study loop
study skills
That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Azken laburpen hori garrantzitsua da. Ideia berriro azaltzen duzunean, zer den sendoa eta zer dagoen oraindik AIari mailegatuta erakusten duzu.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for story tutor with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Modu hau story tutor-erako doituta dago, bere prompt, adibide eta ikaskuntza-fluxu propioekin.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Story Tutor is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Story Tutor-etik balioa lortzeko modurik azkarrena AIari ikaskuntza-lan bat ematea da, ez gai bat bakarrik. Gai batek zer interesatzen zaizun esaten du. Ikaskuntza-lan batek zer laguntza mota behar duzun esaten du.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Gero gehitu saioa pertsonalago egiten duen muga bat:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
Turn the mode into practice

Use Story Tutor when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Creative Brainstormer. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Erabili Story Tutor lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Creative Brainstormer. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.
